name: npm run codegen:check
command: npm run codegen && git diff --exit-code -- packages/contracts-graphql/src/generated

name: npm run codeql
command: npm run codeql:db && npm run codeql:analyze

name: npm run compose:config:all
command: docker compose --profile external-sonar --profile identity --profile cloud-mocks --profile external-sentry --profile observability --profile observability-provider --profile web --profile external-mocks --profile external-web --profile workflow-provider --profile pitr-provider --profile antivirus-provider config

name: npm run compose:up:default
command: docker compose up -d postgres redis clickhouse minio mailpit otel-collector

name: npm run license:policy
command: license-checker-rseidelsohn --production --excludePrivatePackages --failOn 'GPL-2.0;GPL-3.0;AGPL-3.0;SSPL;Commons Clause' --out /dev/null && echo 'License scan passed — no blocked licenses found'

name: npm run secrets:scan
command: command -v gitleaks >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo 'gitleaks not found on PATH ? install from https://github.com/gitleaks/gitleaks/releases or use the gitleaks-action in CI'; exit 0; }; gitleaks detect --source .

name: npm run test:mock-oidc
command: cd services/mock-oidc && npm install --no-audit --no-fund --silent && npm test

name: npm run tsc:check
command: tsc --noEmit -p apps/react-enterprise-app/tsconfig.json && npm run tsc:check:api && npm run tsc:check:packages

name: npm run v2:proof-strength
command: npm run v2:adversarial-usf-audit && npm run v2:readiness -- --strict
